models.notes: Placeholder FastDVDnet temporal pre-filter (T6-7). 5-frame window [t-2, t-1, t, t+1, t+2] -> denoised frame t. SMOKE-ONLY: random init, not trained. Real upstream weights tracked under T6-7b. See docs/adr/0215-fastdvdnet-pre-filter.md and docs/ai/models/fastdvdnet_pre.md.

Tiny FR regressor (C1) — 6-feature canonical-6 vector (adm2, vif_scale0..3, motion2) → VMAF teacher score scalar. Trained on the Netflix Public Dataset (9 ref + 70 dis YUVs) with vmaf_v0.6.1 as DMOS-aligned teacher. 9-fold LOSO mean PLCC = 0.9977 ± 0.0025. Shipped checkpoint trained on all 9 sources. Exported via ai/scripts/train_fr_regressor.py. See docs/ai/models/fr_regressor_v1.md + ADR-0221.

models.description: Tiny residual filter for vmaf_pre — degraded → clean luma.
models.notes: Tiny residual filter baseline for vmaf_pre — self-supervised on KoNViD-1k frames with synthetic blur+JPEG degradation. ~19K params; opset 17. See docs/adr/0168-tinyai-konvid-baselines.md.
LPIPS-SqueezeNet (richzhang/PerceptualSimilarity v0.1). Two-input model: 'ref' + 'dist' ImageNet-normalised NCHW; scalar 'score' output. Exported via ai/lpips_export.py.

MobileSal saliency placeholder (T6-2a smoke-only). Synthetic Conv+Sigmoid matching the upstream MobileSal I/O contract; emits a per-pixel saliency map in [0,1]. Real upstream MIT-licensed weights tracked as T6-2a-followup. See docs/adr/0218-mobilesal-saliency-extractor.md.

models.description: Tiny no-reference quality metric — single-frame 224×224 grayscale.
models.notes: Tiny NR MobileNet baseline trained on KoNViD-1k (CC BY 4.0; not redistributed). 224×224 grayscale input; ~19K params; opset 17. Dynamic-PTQ int8 sidecar produced via ai/scripts/ptq_dynamic.py (T5-3d). See docs/adr/0168-tinyai-konvid-baselines.md and docs/adr/0174-per-model-ptq.md.

models.description: fp16 I/O round-trip CI probe (Identity op).
models.notes: fp16 I/O round-trip probe (Identity op). Exercises the fp16_io cast path; not a quality model.
CI load-path probe (Conv + Identity). Not a quality model.

Placeholder TransNet V2 shot-boundary detector (T6-3a). 100-frame window of 27x48 RGB thumbnails -> per-frame shot-boundary logits. SMOKE-ONLY: random init, not trained. Real upstream weights (Soucek & Lokoc 2020, MIT) tracked under T6-3a-followup. Per-shot CRF predictor is T6-3b. See docs/adr/0223-transnet-v2-shot-detector.md and docs/ai/models/transnet_v2.md.

models.description: Tiny VMAF fusion regressor — canonical-6 features + bundled StandardScaler + mlp_small (~257 params).
models.notes: vmaf_tiny_v2 — Phase-3 validated mlp_small (6→16→8→1) over canonical-6 (adm2, vif_scale0..3, motion2). 90ep Adam lr=1e-3 MSE bs=256. StandardScaler baked into ONNX graph (ADR-0216). Trained 4-corpus parquet (NF+KV+BVI-DVC A+B+C+D, 330499 rows). PLCC 0.9978±0.0021 NF LOSO; 0.9998 KV 5-fold; 0.9999 ship-gate. See docs/ai/models/vmaf_tiny_v2.md.

models.description: Tiny VMAF fusion regressor — canonical-6 features + bundled StandardScaler + mlp_medium (~769 params).
models.notes: vmaf_tiny_v3 — mlp_medium (6→32→16→1, 769 params) over canonical-6. Same recipe as v2 (90ep Adam lr=1e-3 MSE bs=256, scaler baked into ONNX). Trained on 4-corpus parquet (NF+KV+BVI-DVC A+B+C+D, 330499 rows). PLCC 0.9986±0.0015 NF LOSO (+0.0008 over v2 0.9978±0.0021). Use v2 by default; v3 for higher-PLCC needs. See docs/ai/models/vmaf_tiny_v3.md + ADR-0241.
